summary: Completed comprehensive testing of mobile UI improvements for EU Digital Banking Platform. All features working perfectly: 1) Notification dropdown is properly centered on mobile (left-4 right-4), 2) User avatar circle with 'JD' initials displays correctly on mobile only, 3) User menu dropdown shows all bank features (Dashboard, Accounts, Transfers, Cards, Transactions, Profile, Security, Support) with icons and descriptions, 4) Navigation works correctly including Support access for restricted users, 5) Tax hold restriction alert displays when accessing Transfers, 6) Sign Out functionality works, 7) Desktop correctly shows Logout button instead of avatar.
passed_tests: User avatar circle with 'JD' initials visible on mobile
Notification dropdown perfectly centered on mobile (left-4 right-4, width: 358px)
User menu dropdown displays all 8 menu items (Dashboard, Accounts, Transfers, Cards, Transactions, Profile, Security, Support)
Each menu item has icon and description
Sign Out button present in user menu
Support page navigation works (accessible for restricted users)
Tax hold restriction alert displays when clicking Transfers
User stays on dashboard after Transfers click (restriction working)
Sign Out redirects to login page
User avatar correctly hidden on desktop (sm:hidden working)
Mobile-only and desktop-only elements working as expected
